---
title: "Research in English"
lang: en
toc: true
---

Selected research papers and working papers in English.

## Working Papers

::: {.content-card}
::: {.card-meta}
Working Paper · 2026 ::: {.lang-badge}EN:::
:::
::: {.card-title}
[Demographic Sustainability Level: A Three-Constraint Framework for Minimum Viable Fertility](sustainability-level.qmd)
:::
::: {.card-summary}
Defines the minimum total fertility rate that simultaneously satisfies three demographic constraints: net reproduction (NRR ≥ 1), old-age dependency (OADR ≤ threshold), and population decline rate. Derives a closed-form solution with PPR₁ ≥ 0.70 as the behavioral floor.
:::
:::

::: {.content-card}
::: {.card-meta}
Working Paper · 2026 ::: {.lang-badge}EN:::
:::
::: {.card-title}
[Norm Diffusion Asymmetry and Fertility Decline in Middle-Income Countries](norm-diffusion.qmd)
:::
::: {.card-summary}
Proposes that institutional hardware (legal protections, childcare, housing) travels slower than cultural software (fertility norms), creating an asymmetric diffusion pattern that explains why middle-income countries experience fertility decline without the macroeconomic trigger that Goldin's model requires.
:::
:::

## Contact

For academic correspondence: mehmet.sezgin@aile.gov.tr
